creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text:
I tried the following to listen to packets:

orbitz@bsdell /u/src> sudo usbconfig list
ugen0.1: <Intel XHCI root HUB> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=SUPER (5.0Gbps) pwr=SAVE (0mA)
ugen0.2: <CN0FFMHCLOG00829B68TA01 IntegratedWebcamHD> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (500mA)
ugen0.3: <vendor 0x0489 product 0xe0a2> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (100mA)
ugen0.4: <Generic Blue Microphones> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (100mA)
orbitz@bsdell /u/src> sudo usbdump -i ugen0.4
usbdump: Invalid bus interface: ugen0.4
orbitz@bsdell /u/src> sudo usbdump -d ugen0.4
20:27:54.017507 usbus0.4 SUBM-CTRL-EP=00000000,SPD=HIGH,NFR=1,SLEN=8,IVAL=0
